sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102338" key="tanumh/khs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τᾰνῠμήκης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n102338.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">long-stretched, tall</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἰτέαι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.170</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
